2603.10588.title: Does LLM Alignment Really Need Diversity? An Empirical Study of Adapting RLVR Methods for Moral Reasoning
2603.10588.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has achieved remarkable success in logical reasoning tasks, yet whether large language model (LLM) alignment requires fundamentally different approaches remains unclear. Given the apparent tolerance for multiple valid responses in moral reasoning, a natural hypothesis is that alignment tasks inherently require diversity-seeking distribution-matching algorithms rather than reward-maximizing policy-based methods. We conduct the first comprehensive empirical study comparing both paradigms on MoReBench. To enable stable RLVR training, we build a rubric-grounded reward pipeline by training a Qwen3-1.7B judge model. Contrary to our hypothesis, we find that distribution-matching approaches do not demonstrate significant advantages over reward-maximizing methods as expected on alignment tasks. Through semantic visualization mapping high-reward responses to semantic space, we demonstrate that moral reasoning exhibits more concentrated high-reward distributions than mathematical reasoning, where diverse solution strategies yield similarly high rewards. This counter-intuitive finding explains why mode-seeking optimization proves equally or more effective for alignment tasks. Our results suggest that alignment tasks do not inherently require diversity-preserving algorithms, and standard reward-maximizing RLVR methods can effectively transfer to moral reasoning without explicit diversity mechanisms.
2603.10588.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵（RLVR）在邏輯推理任務中取得了顯著成功，但大型語言模型（LLM）對齊是否需要根本不同的方法仍不清楚。考慮到在道德推理中對多個有效回應的明顯容忍，自然的假設是，對齊任務本質上需要尋求多樣性的分佈匹配算法，而不是基於獎勵最大化的策略方法。我們在 MoReBench 上進行了首次全面的實證研究，對比這兩種範式。為了使 RLVR 訓練穩定，我們通過訓練 Qwen3-1.7B 評判模型建立了一個基於標準的獎勵管道。與我們的假設相反，我們發現分佈匹配方法在對齊任務上並未顯示出比獎勵最大化方法更顯著的優勢。通過語義可視化將高獎勵回應映射到語義空間，我們證明道德推理的高獎勵分佈比數學推理更為集中，後者的多樣解決策略產生類似的高獎勵。這一反直覺的發現解釋了為什麼尋求模式的優化在對齊任務中同樣或更有效。我們的結果表明，對齊任務本質上不需要保留多樣性的算法，標準的獎勵最大化 RLVR 方法可以在沒有明確多樣性機制的情況下有效轉移到道德推理中。
2603.10588.author: Zhaowei Zhang et.al.
2603.10588.authors: Zhaowei Zhang, Xiaohan Liu, Xuekai Zhu, Junchao Huang, Ceyao Zhang, Zhiyuan Feng, Yaodong Yang, Xiaoyuan Yi, Xing Xie
